sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! After the second RIGHT:
- Before: `...NNNwwwNNNwww...` (two separate green boxes)
- After:  `...NNWNNNwww...` (they merged!)
The two green-framed boxes have now merged into one. The W-centered box absorbed/merged with the B-centered box. Looking at row 31:
- Before: `...NWNwwwNBN...` (W-box, gap, B-box)
- After:  `...NWWNBN...` (merged: W at center, now overlapping)
Wait, looking more carefully at the after state:
Row 30: `...NNWNNN...`
Row 31: `...NWWNBN...`
Row 32: `...NNWNNN...`
So it looks like the W-centered box moved right and merged with the B-centered box. The result seems to be a combined object with both W and B visible.
Actually wait - let me look at the current state more carefully:
Row 30: `gwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwNNWNNNwwwppppppwwwwwc`
Row 31: `gwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwNWWNBNwwwppppppwwwwww`
Row 32: `gwwcccccwwwwwwwwNNWNNNwwwppppppwwwwww`
Hmm, the pattern `NNWNNN` and `NWWNBN` suggests the two objects are now overlapping/merged. The white 3x3 block that was between them seems to have been absorbed or moved.
Let me try pressing RIGHT again to see what happens next.
